creator: markj@FreeBSD.org
text:
Fixed by https://cgit.FreeBSD.org/src/commit/?id=541e7a98b762916cd951a64dd7e77efd51dfa8dc, thank you.

Just a comment for next time: in general it's not really necessary to open a bugzilla report which refers to an existing github PR.  Opening a github pull request is sufficient.
